description_long: This is a rounded, matte-finished cup with a soft pink hue and a whimsical decorative pattern. The cup features a sturdy, thick handle and a wide, open mouth, making it suitable for holding beverages. On one side, there is a playful illustration of a cartoonish red plant with teeth, sitting atop a slice of cake, while the rest of the cup is adorned with small, pink cake slice motifs. The interior is smooth and matches the exterior color, and the cup appears to be made of ceramic or porcelain. The surface is non-glossy, giving it a gentle, tactile feel. The overall design is modern and playful, likely appealing to a youthful or creative audience.
description: A matte, pink ceramic cup with a cartoon plant and cake slice motifs, featuring a thick handle and playful design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cartoon plant illustration and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered, showing cake slice motifs and no main illustration.
description_view_2: Rear view with only cake slice motifs visible, handle on the left.
description_view_3: Back view with no handle visible, only cake slice motifs on the surface.
